Source   Edit  

Simultaneous Resolution Type Definitions

Generic framework types for simultaneous fleet order resolution. Supports colonization, assault, fleet mergers, and other competitive orders.

Imports

../order_types, ../../common/types/core

Types

BlockadeConflict = object
  targetColony*: SystemId
  intents*: seq[BlockadeIntent]
Multiple houses blockading same colony Source   Edit   
BlockadeIntent = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  fleetId*: FleetId
  targetColony*: SystemId
  blockadeStrength*: int
Intent to blockade a colony Source   Edit   
BlockadeResult = OrderResult[SystemId]
Result of blockade resolution Source   Edit   
ColonizationConflict = object
  targetSystem*: SystemId
  intents*: seq[ColonizationIntent]
Multiple houses attempting to colonize same system Source   Edit   
ColonizationIntent = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  fleetId*: FleetId
  targetSystem*: SystemId
  fleetStrength*: int
  hasStandingOrders*: bool
Intent to colonize a system Source   Edit   
ColonizationResult = OrderResult[SystemId]
Result of colonization resolution Source   Edit   
EspionageConflict = object
  targetSystem*: SystemId
  intents*: seq[EspionageIntent]
Multiple houses conducting espionage in same system Source   Edit   
EspionageIntent = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  fleetId*: FleetId
  targetSystem*: SystemId
  orderType*: string
  espionageStrength*: int
  isDishonored*: bool
Intent to conduct espionage in a system Source   Edit   
EspionageResult = OrderResult[SystemId]
Result of espionage resolution Source   Edit   
OrderResult[T] = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  fleetId*: FleetId
  originalTarget*: T
  outcome*: ResolutionOutcome
  actualTarget*: Option[T]
  prestigeAwarded*: int
Generic result type for competitive order resolution Source   Edit   
PlanetaryCombatConflict = object
  targetColony*: SystemId
  intents*: seq[PlanetaryCombatIntent]
Multiple houses attacking same colony Source   Edit   
PlanetaryCombatIntent = object
  houseId*: HouseId
  fleetId*: FleetId
  targetColony*: SystemId
  orderType*: string
  attackStrength*: int
Intent to attack a colony (bombardment or invasion) Source   Edit   
PlanetaryCombatResult = OrderResult[SystemId]
Result of planetary combat resolution Source   Edit   
ResolutionOutcome {.pure.} = enum
  Success,                  ## Order succeeded (won conflict or no conflict)
  ConflictLost,             ## Lost conflict to stronger competitor
  FallbackSuccess,          ## Original target failed, but fallback succeeded
  NoViableTarget,           ## No viable alternative target found
  TargetDestroyed,          ## Target destroyed before operation completed
  InsufficientForce          ## Not enough military force to succeed
Outcome of a competitive order resolution Source   Edit
